back: Formal system using propositions (true/false statements) and logical operators (AND, OR, NOT).

front: What does KB entails alpha mean?
back: The knowledge base KB entails alpha (KB ⊨ α) if alpha is true in all models where KB is true.
Inference rule: from P→Q and P, infer Q.
Standard form where formulas are conjunctions (AND) of disjunctive (OR) clauses.
Inference rule for CNF: from (P ∨ α) and (¬P ∨ β), infer (α ∨ β).
Algorithm checking CNF satisfiability using unit propagation and pure literal elimination.
